# The Raj Mahaal

The Raj Mahaal is Sodepur's premier fully air-conditioned banquet hall for weddings, receptions, birthdays, and corporate events. Capacity up to 500 guests.

## Links
- [Home - The Raj Mahaal](https://therajmahaal.vercel.app/)
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/people/The-Raj-Mahaal/61586335487117/)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/therajmahaal/)
- [Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/nGhLzrnZMJUu5QFb7)
